description: Blacklist of common phrases and patterns frequently used by high-volume repost/aggregator accounts (like the Top-30 revenue share accounts described in Nikita Bier's experiment). These are often engagement bait, clickbait, or low-originality signals. Use for filtering searches to prioritize more original content.
notes: Match is case-insensitive substring search. Add more specific phrases as needed. Some phrases like 'breaking:' or 'writer:' may appear in legitimate news too — tune threshold or combine with other signals (high post frequency, low originality indicators) for better accuracy. The Top-30 list itself is not public.
